description: Create a QGIS Processing Model to automate a noise pollution analysis workflow. The model must accept two vector layer inputs, 'Airports' and 'Urban Areas', and perform a 0.05-degree buffer with 5 segments on the airports followed by an intersection with the urban areas. Name the final model output 'Affected Urban Areas' and save the model file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/models/airport_impact.model3. Execute the model using the source data at /home/ga/GIS_Data/source/ne_10m_airports.shp and /home/ga/GIS_Data/source/ne_10m_urban_areas.shp, and export the resulting layer to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/urban_noise_zones.geojson.
